description.p: Beings made of cursed energy within a shell, somehow gaining sentience.

Ability Score Increase.You increase one ability score of your choice by 4, as you are purpose built for a single purpose.
Age.Your lifespan is hypothetically infinite if you repair yourself.
Alignment.Cursed Corpses are almost always neutral people, not caring about what happens to others around them and usually wanting to exist peacefully.
Size.Your size can be small to large.
Speed.Your base walking speed is 35 feet.
Unnatural.As a construct, you don’t need to breathe, drink, eat, or sleep. However you need materials to mend yourself during a rest.
Languages.You can speak, read, and write Common.
Subrace.There are multiple forms of corpses. The soft bodies range from plush like, to normal living materials like flesh. Hard Shell is the hard skinned stone, wood, or metal.
As a construct, you don’t need to breathe, drink, eat, or sleep. However you need materials to mend yourself during a rest.

sheet.description: You don’t need to breathe, drink, eat, or sleep. However you need materials to mend yourself during a rest.

description.p: The simpler, more life-like Cursed Corpses are soft bodies, with their life-like design having both advantages and flaws.

Tailored Appearance.You gain expertise in either intimidation, persuasion, or performance.
Surprise.You can make a Performance check to disguise yourself as what you resemble. Your sudden reveal may stun an enemy. Once per long rest when you reveal yourself, you can force a creature within 10 feet to make a Wisdom saving throw:(DC 10 + your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier) becoming stunned until the beginning of their turn on failure.

You can make a Performance check to disguise yourself as what you resemble. Your sudden reveal may stun an enemy. Once per long rest when you reveal yourself, you can force a creature within 10 feet to make a Wisdom saving throw:(DC 10 + your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier) becoming stunned until the beginning of their turn on failure.

sheet.description: You can make a Performance check to disguise yourself as what you resemble. When you reveal yourself, you can force a creature within 10 feet to make a Wisdom saving throw DC{{jjk:surprise:dc}}, becoming stunned until the beginning of their turn on failure.

description.p: The more complicated intricate form of Cursed Corpses are the hard shells. Their combat ability is not to be underestimated.

Integrated Armor.Your body has built-in defensive layers, which can be enhanced with armor.
You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class.
You can don only armor with which you have proficiency. To don armor, you must incorporate it into your body over the course of 1 hour, during which you must remain in contact with the armor. To doff armor, you must spend 1 hour removing it. You can rest while donning or doffing armor in this way.
While you live, your armor can't be removed from your body against your will.
Your body has built-in defensive layers, which can be enhanced with armor.

ul.li: You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class.

You can don only armor with which you have proficiency. To don armor, you must incorporate it into your body over the course of 1 hour, during which you must remain in contact with the armor. To doff armor, you must spend 1 hour removing it. You can rest while donning or doffing armor in this way.
While you live, your armor can't be removed from your body against your will.

sheet.description: You can don only armor with which you have proficiency. To don armor, you must incorporate it into your body over the course of 1 hour, during which you must remain in contact with the armor. To doff armor, you must spend 1 hour removing it. You can rest while donning or doffing armor in this way. While you live, your armor can't be removed from your body against your will.
